system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.

{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  RAS;

RAS
{
    model           kEpsilon;
    turbulence      on;
    printCoeffs     on;
    mu              nu;
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,k)      Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,omega)  Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-07;
        relTol          0.0001;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        GaussSorted;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         2;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
    consistent        yes;
}

relaxationFactors
{
    fields
    {
        p               0.3;
        U               0.7;
        k               0.7;
        epsilon         0.7;
        nuTilda         0.7;
    }
    equations
    {
        p               0.3;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>

GaussSeidel

file: /pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_C_20260516_195157_run2/runs/pitzDaily/1/system/fvSolution/solvers/(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda) from line 28 to line 31.

    From function static Foam::autoPtr<Foam::lduMatrix::smoother> Foam::lduMatrix::smoother::New(const Foam::word&, const Foam::lduMatrix&, const Foam::FieldField<Foam::Field, double>&, const Foam::FieldField<Foam::Field, double>&, const Foam::lduInterfaceFieldPtrsList&, const Foam::dictionary&)
    in file matrices/lduMatrix/lduMatrix/lduMatrixSmoother.C at line 121.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<reviewer_analysis># Error Diagnosis and Resolution

## Error Analysis

The error message is clear:

```
Unknown asymmetric matrix smoother GaussSorted

Valid asymmetric matrix smoothers are :
5
(
DILU
DILUGaussSeidel
GaussSeidel
nonBlockingGaussSeidel
symGaussSeidel
)
```

The `fvSolution` file references `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` solver block using `smoothSolver` with `smoother GaussSorted`. However, **`GaussSorted` is only valid for symmetric matrices**. Since OpenFOAM 10 (which this appears to be based on, given the file paths and syntax), the `(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)` pattern creates an **asymmetric matrix** because these fields involve convection terms, making their coefficient matrices asymmetric.

The valid asymmetric smoothers listed confirm that `GaussSorted` cannot be used here.

## Root Cause

In `system/fvSolution`, the solver block for `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` uses `smoother GaussSorted;`, but since these fields form asymmetric systems (due to convective terms), `GaussSorted` is invalid. The same applies to `nuTilda`.

## Solution

Change the smoother from `GaussSorted` to one of the valid asymmetric smoothers. Based on the previous attempts, `GaussSeidel` worked but ultimately failed due to numerical instability. The recommended approach is:

**In `system/fvSolution`**, change the `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` solver block to use `smoother GaussSeidel;` instead of `GaussSorted;`:

```
"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
{
    solver          smoothSolver;
    smoother        GaussSeidel;
    tolerance       1e-06;
    relTol          0.1;
}

"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"
{
    $U;
    relTol          0;
}
```

Additionally, to improve robustness against the extreme Courant numbers that were seen in Attempt 1 (reaching 5.08), also update the `fvSchemes` to ensure first-order upwind is used for `k` and `epsilon`:

In `system/fvSchemes`, verify that:
```
div(phi,k)      Gauss upwind;
div(phi,epsilon) Gauss upwind;
```

are set. If they show `limitedLinear 1` instead, change them back to `upwind`.

If the above `fvSchemes` check shows `upwind` already, then the sole fix is changing the smoother in `fvSolution` from `GaussSorted` to `GaussSeidel` for the asymmetric solver block.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/fvSolution', 'changes': 'Change smoother from GaussSorted to GaussSeidel in the (U|k|epsilon|nuTilda) solver block'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a Reynolds-Averaged Simulation (RAS) pitzdaily simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm. The domain is a 2D millimeter-scale channel geometry. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 10m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls. Use timestep of 0.0001 and output every 0.01. Finaltime is 0.3. use nu value of 1e-5.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
